lines.speaker: Lunderwin
lines.text: Buying cabbage am I, not have such thing where I from. Will pay money much handsome for wondrous object, cabbage you called.

lines.speaker: Lunderwin
lines.text: Say I 100 gold coins each fair price to be giving yes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alas, I have no cabbages either...

lines.speaker: Lunderwin
lines.text: Pity be that, I want badly do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll sell you all my cabbages.

lines.speaker: Lunderwin
lines.text: Business good doing with you! Please, again come, buying always.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I will keep my cabbbages.
